Sindarov, Javokhir (2727) - Gukesh D (2682)
Grand Chess Tour: Super Rapid & Blitz Poland 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.05.06
B10 Caro-Kann defence

1.e4 c6 2.Nf3 d5 3.d3 Qc7 4.exd5 cxd5 5.c4 Nf6 6.Nc3 e6 7.g3 Bb4 8.Bg2 dxc4 9.Bf4 Qa5 10.dxc4 Bxc3+ 11.bxc3 Qxc3+ 12.Nd2 e5 13.Rc1 Qa5 14.Bg5 Bg4 15.Qc2 Nc6 16.O-O O-O 17.h3 Be6 18.Bxf6 gxf6 19.Ne4 Kg7 20.f4 f5 21.Ng5 e4 22.Qb2+ Kg8 23.Kh2 Qb6 24.Qe2 Qd4 25.Nxe4 fxe4 26.f5 Bc8 27.Rcd1 Qf6 28.Qxe4 Rd8 29.Rxd8+ Nxd8 30.Qe8+ Kg7 31.Rf4 h5 32.Qe2 Bd7 33.Qxh5 Nc6 34.Rh4 Re8 35.Qg4+ Kf8 36.Qf4 Re2 37.Qf3 Rxa2 38.Qe3 Qb2 39.Qh6+ Ke8 40.Qh8+ Qxh8 41.Rxh8+ Ke7 42.g4 a5 43.Kg3 a4 44.Ra8 a3 45.h4 Ne5 46.Bd5 Bc6 47.h5 Bxd5 48.cxd5 Ra1 49.h6 Rg1+ 50.Kf4 f6 51.h7 Rxg4+ 52.Ke3 Nf7
